_comment: Filename → department mapping for the SpectroNova per-department exports (the filenames do NOT identify the department). Derived 2026-07-13 by chaining PO → Delivery Note → Stock Receipt → JV GL-code prefixes; evidence in 'Accounting raw data/output/raw-data-inventory.md'. FOUAD: review each row, then set confirmed=true — the importer refuses to emit SQL until then.

vendor_aliases._comment: SpectroNova supplier names → canonical vendors.name (internal profit centers already seeded in 0013). Extend as the report flags unmatched internals.
